name: @designless/annotate
description: Build-time source markers so Designless can route a rendered element back to its exact source line. Inert, dev-only, zero network. The only Designless code in your build.
author: Designless Private Limited <hello@designless.app>

scripts.build:swc: cargo build --release --target wasm32-wasip1 --manifest-path swc-plugin/Cargo.toml && cp swc-plugin/target/wasm32-wasip1/release/designless_annotate_swc.wasm swc-plugin/annotate.wasm
